addons.name: Test Addon
addons.description: Developer test addon — exercises every AddonContext API feature: two searchable catalogs (movies + series), stream resolver with HTTP + HLS streams and S01E01 episode support, metadata provider with fetchSeasons / fetchEpisodes / prefetchDetails, ctx.store set/get/delete with boot counter, ctx.getAddonConfig to read another addon's config, ctx.getAddonStore for read-only cross-addon SQLite access, all three variable types (string secret / number / boolean), and teardown cleanup.
addons.author: SparkofDarkness

plugins.name: Test Plugin
plugins.description: Developer test plugin — exercises every PluginContext API feature: toolbar UI slot (button opens a modal panel with live store snapshot), statusbar UI slot (live hook-fire counter), three Command Palette commands (say hello / log config / reset store), ctx.store set/get/delete/clear with session counter, all four hook events (stream:beforeConnect transforms stream, stream:afterConnect observes final URL, player:progressSaved writes last position to store, player:markedWatched counts per-item view history), config variables (string color / boolean toggle), React via window.__HW_React (no bundled React copy), and teardown that unsubscribes all four hooks.
plugins.author: SparkofDarkness
